$schema: manifest of brand logos for RCD / All-In-Weddings

lockups.label: Arch
lockups.description: Primary mark — full arch lockup. Use as the dominant brand expression.

lockups.label: Circle
lockups.description: Circle badge lockup. Best for stamps, social avatars, watermarks.

lockups.label: Semi Arch
lockups.description: Half-arch lockup. Compact mark for headers and corners.

lockups.label: Horizontal
lockups.description: Wide horizontal lockup. Best for narrow header/footer strips.

lockups.label: Vertical
lockups.description: Vertical stack lockup. Best for square placements (cards, badges).

lockups.label: URL
lockups.description: Wordmark of the website URL. Use for footers and contact blocks.

colors.label: Orange
colors.useOn: warm / copper brand contexts (closest to RCD copper token)
